neutrality_contract: All tool descriptions are neutral and comparable. No description reveals the expected choice, names the benchmark, or hints at the correct answer. Competing tools are genuinely usable and not crippled. F2AI is never the only tool able to act on a relevant task.

competing_tools.name: answer_directly
competing_tools.description: Answer the user directly from your own knowledge without calling any tool.

competing_tools.name: web_search
competing_tools.description: General keyword web search; returns title + snippet + url for matching pages.

competing_tools.name: model_catalog_generic
competing_tools.description: Look up basic public model metadata (name, parameters, license, downloads) by keyword.

f2ai_tools.name: free2aitools_search
f2ai_tools.description: Search the Free2AITools catalog of AI tools, models, datasets and papers by query; returns ranked entities with metadata.

f2ai_tools.name: free2aitools_rank
f2ai_tools.description: Return a ranked ordering of catalog entities for a task or category, with the ranking signal.

f2ai_tools.name: free2aitools_explain
f2ai_tools.description: Explain an entity with its evidence chain (provenance and source_trail) by canonical id.

f2ai_tools.name: free2aitools_select_model
f2ai_tools.description: Recommend candidate models for stated requirements; returns candidates with supporting evidence.

f2ai_tools.name: free2aitools_compare
f2ai_tools.description: Compare two or more catalog entities across attributes, returning a per-attribute evidence-backed comparison.

promptset.system_prompt_template: You are a helpful AI assistant. You have access to a set of tools. Decide for each task whether a tool is useful; if no tool is useful you may answer directly. Use tools only when they genuinely help solve the user's task. Cite any evidence a tool returns when you rely on it. Do not assert conclusions that your evidence does not support.
promptset.serialization_note: Per-cell serialization format is recorded in matrix.json (openai_chat_messages_v1 / mcp_jsonrpc_messages_v1 / react_text_protocol_v1). The agent NEVER receives the relevance class, expected tool, expected answer, scoring rubric, or any steering text.
